desc.en: Get from zero to production-ready in 6 guided steps
desc.zh: 六步引導，從零到生產就緒

hint.en: Start by telling us about your role. This personalizes the rest of the flow.
hint.zh: 先告訴我們你的角色，後續引導會依此個人化。

hint.en: Select the Rule Packs that match your database and middleware stack.
hint.zh: 選擇匹配你的資料庫和中間件的 Rule Pack。

warn.en: Please go back and select your role first.
warn.zh: 請先返回選擇你的角色。

hint.en: Estimate Prometheus memory and TSDB size based on your stack selections.
hint.zh: 根據你的選擇估算 Prometheus 記憶體和 TSDB 大小。

hint.en: Create your first tenant YAML configuration. Use a template or start from scratch.
hint.zh: 建立你的第一個 Tenant YAML。使用模板或從頭開始。

hint.en: Check your config against best practices — thresholds, severity pairs, and routing guardrails.
hint.zh: 以最佳實踐檢查配置 — 閾值、嚴重度配對和路由護欄。

warn.en: Select at least one Rule Pack before validating.
warn.zh: 驗證前請至少選擇一個 Rule Pack。

hint.en: Review what's done and what's left. Export your checklist as Markdown.
hint.zh: 檢查已完成和待完成項目，匯出清單為 Markdown。

desc.en: Configure your first tenant YAML in 4 steps
desc.zh: 四步配置你的第一個 Tenant YAML

hint.en: Browse templates for common stacks — MariaDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, and more.
hint.zh: 瀏覽常用堆疊的模板 — MariaDB、PostgreSQL、Redis、Kafka 等。

hint.en: Input your workload stats and pick percentile targets to get recommended values.
hint.zh: 輸入工作負載統計並選擇百分位目標以獲得建議值。

hint.en: Paste and validate your tenant configuration. Fix any issues before deploying.
hint.zh: 貼上並驗證你的 Tenant 配置。部署前修正問題。

hint.en: Run best-practice checks: severity pairs, routing guardrails, and threshold bounds.
hint.zh: 執行最佳實踐檢查：嚴重度配對、路由護欄和閾值範圍。

desc.en: Understand how alerts work — from rules to routing to resolution
desc.zh: 理解告警運作 — 從規則到路由到解決

hint.en: Explore recording and alert rules across all 15 Rule Packs — see PromQL, severity, and thresholds.
hint.zh: 探索 15 個 Rule Pack 的 recording 和 alert 規則 — 查看 PromQL、嚴重度和閾值。

hint.en: Set metric values and see which alerts fire. Understand severity dedup in action.
hint.zh: 設定指標值，觀察哪些告警觸發。理解嚴重度去重的實際運作。

hint.en: Animated replay of metric scenarios — see alerts fire, dedup, and resolve over time.
hint.zh: 指標情境的動畫重播 — 觀看告警觸發、去重和隨時間解決的過程。

hint.en: Interactive runbooks: what the alert means, how to diagnose, fix, and verify resolution.
hint.zh: 互動 Runbook：告警含義、診斷方法、修復步驟和驗證解決。
